notes: Haiti report a fully fit squad with no injury concerns ahead of their first World Cup match in 52 years. Scotland are without key midfielder Billy Gilmour (knee injury, tournament-ending), while Scott McTominay (illness) and Scott McKenna (knock) were late doubts but both are expected to start; Tommy Conway also misses out with an ankle problem.
home_scorers: Duckens Nazon (leading striker / Haiti's record goalscorer)
Wilson Isidor (co-striker / Premier League experience, Sunderland)

away_scorers: Scott McTominay (attacking midfielder / 15 international goals, clinical in box)
